2606.16558.title: ROSA-RL: Uncertainty-Aware Roundabout Optimized Speed Advisory with Reinforcement Learning
2606.16558.paper_summary: Roundabouts challenge automated driving in mixed traffic, as heterogeneous and non-deterministic human behavior, unknown driving intentions, and high interaction complexity create uncertainty about whether the conflict zone will be blocked or available at the moment of entry. We present ROSA-RL -- uncertainty-aware Roundabout Optimized Speed Advisory with Reinforcement Learning. It enables safe and efficient roundabout entry for automated and human-driven vehicles in mixed traffic through probabilistic conflict forecasting. A Transformer-based model predicts conflict zone occupancy over a five-second horizon, capturing multi-agent interactions to anticipate upcoming conflicts and available gaps. The prediction outputs encode uncertainty in future motion and intent, and augment the state of a classical RL framework, enabling uncertainty-aware speed coordination. Evaluated in simulations grounded in real-world data, ROSA-RL can effectively handle uncertainty and outperform a comparable model-based baseline, closing the gap to an ideal setting assuming fully known occupancy while improving traffic efficiency and safety. The source code of this work is available under: github.com/urbanAIthi/ROSA-RL.
2606.16558.paper_summary_zh: 圓環在混合交通中對自動駕駛提出挑戰，因為異質且非決定性的人類行為、未知的駕駛意圖以及高互動複雜性使得在進入時對衝突區域是否被阻塞或可用產生不確定性。<lb/>我們提出了ROSA-RL——不確定性感知的圓環優化速度建議系統，結合強化學習。<lb/>它通過概率衝突預測，使自動駕駛和人類駕駛的車輛在混合交通中安全高效地進入圓環。<lb/>基於Transformer的模型預測五秒內的衝突區域佔用情況，捕捉多代理互動，以預測即將發生的衝突和可用的空隙。<lb/>預測輸出編碼了未來運動和意圖的不確定性，並增強了經典強化學習框架的狀態，使得不確定性感知的速度協調成為可能。<lb/>在基於真實世界數據的模擬中進行評估，ROSA-RL能有效處理不確定性，並超越可比較的基於模型的基準，縮小與假設完全已知佔用的理想情境之間的差距，同時提高交通效率和安全性。<lb/>這項工作的源代碼可在以下網址獲得：github.com/urbanAIthi/ROSA-RL。
2606.16558.author: Anna-Lena Schlamp et.al.
2606.16558.authors: Anna-Lena Schlamp, Jeremias Gerner, Klaus Bogenberger, Werner Huber, Stefanie Schmidtner
